languages.text: {n}Ваш голос звучит громче дождя и ветра, проникая в самое сердце: Паск уверенно разворачивается и наводит пушку на отряд техножрецов, с которыми он пришел.{/n}
{n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваш голос звучит громче дождя и ветра, проникая в самое сердце: Паск уверенно разворачивается и наводит пушку на отряд техножрецов, с которыми он пришел.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}
{n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}
{n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの声は雨や風よりも大きく、パスクの心を揺さぶる。彼は決断して振り返り、テクプリストの部隊を指差した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの声は雨や風よりも大きく、パスクの心を揺さぶる。彼は決断して振り返り、テクプリストの部隊を指差した。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu voz se hace oír por encima de la lluvia y el viento y cala en el corazón de Pask, que se gira y apunta su arma contra los tecnosacerdotes con los que ha venido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu voz se hace oír por encima de la lluvia y el viento y cala en el corazón de Pask, que se gira y apunta su arma contra los tecnosacerdotes con los que ha venido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的声音压过了风雨，直刺帕斯克心底——他猛转过身，断然将武器对准了那队与他一同前来的技术神甫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的声音压过了风雨，直刺帕斯克心底——他猛转过身，断然将武器对准了那队与他一同前来的技术神甫。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Stimme übertönt den Regen und den Wind und trifft Pask mitten ins Herz. Er wirbelt entschlossen herum und richtet seine Waffe auf die Techpriester, mit denen er gekommen war.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Stimme übertönt den Regen und den Wind und trifft Pask mitten ins Herz. Er wirbelt entschlossen herum und richtet seine Waffe auf die Techpriester, mit denen er gekommen war.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sesin, yağmur ve rüzgârdan daha gür çıkıp Pask'ın tam kalbine işliyor. Pask, kararlı bir şekilde arkasını dönüyor ve silahını birlikte geldiği Tekno Rahip müfrezesine doğrultuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your voice is louder than the rain and the wind, striking at Pask's very heart — he decisively whips around and points his weapon at the squad of Tech-Priests he came with.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sesin, yağmur ve rüzgârdan daha gür çıkıp Pask'ın tam kalbine işliyor. Pask, kararlı bir şekilde arkasını dönüyor ve silahını birlikte geldiği Tekno Rahip müfrezesine doğrultuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Plus forte que la pluie, plus forte même que le vent, votre voix vient toucher Pask en plein cœur. Il se retourne brusquement et pointe son arme sur l'escouade de technoprêtres qui l'accompagne.{/n}
